examples.sentence: 日本では、左側を運転することになっています。
examples.translation: In Japan, it is decided that people drive on the left side.
examples.translationEn: In Japan, it is decided that people drive on the left side
examples.romaji: Nihon de wa, hidarigawa o unten suru koto ni natte imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: In Japan, it is decided that people drive on the left side

examples.sentence: 会社の規則では、制服を着ることになっている。
examples.translation: According to the company rules, we are supposed to wear uniforms.
examples.translationEn: According to the company rules, we are supposed to wear uniforms
examples.romaji: Kaisha no kisoku de wa, seifuku o kiru koto ni natte iru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: According to the company rules, we are supposed to wear uniforms

examples.sentence: 彼女は明日結婚することになっています。
examples.translation: She is supposed to get married tomorrow.
examples.translationEn: She is supposed to get married tomorrow
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa ashita kekkon suru koto ni natte imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: She is supposed to get married tomorrow

examples.sentence: この商品は高品質だということになっています。
examples.translation: It is said (or generally accepted) that this product is of high quality.
examples.translationEn: It is said (or generally accepted) that this product is of high quality
examples.romaji: Kono shouhin wa kouhinshitsu da to iu koto ni natte imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: It is said (or generally accepted) that this product is of high quality

examples.sentence: お金さえあれば、幸せです。
examples.translation: As long as I have money, I’m happy.
examples.translationEn: As long as I have money, I’m happy
examples.romaji: Okane sae areba, shiawase desu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: As long as I have money, I’m happy

examples.sentence: 試験に合格しさえすれば、卒業できます。
examples.translation: If only I pass the exam, I can graduate.
examples.translationEn: If only I pass the exam, I can graduate
examples.romaji: Shiken ni goukaku shi sae sureba, sotsugyou dekimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If only I pass the exam, I can graduate

examples.sentence: 野菜さえたくさん食べれば、母は喜びます。
examples.translation: As long as I eat plenty of vegetables, my mother will be happy.
examples.translationEn: As long as I eat plenty of vegetables, my mother will be happy
examples.romaji: Yasai sae takusan tabereba, haha wa yorokobimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: As long as I eat plenty of vegetables, my mother will be happy

examples.sentence: 交通費さえ支払ってもらえれば、どこへでも行きます。
examples.translation: As long as my transportation costs are covered, I’ll go anywhere.
examples.translationEn: As long as my transportation costs are covered, I’ll go anywhere
examples.romaji: Koutsuuhi sae shiharatte moraereba, doko e demo ikimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: As long as my transportation costs are covered, I’ll go anywhere

examples.sentence: この仕事は締め切りが近いので、残業せざるを得ない。
examples.translation: Since the deadline is near, I have no choice but to work overtime.
examples.translationEn: Since the deadline is near, I have no choice but to work overtime
examples.romaji: Kono shigoto wa shimekiri ga chikai no de, zangyou sezaru wo enai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Since the deadline is near, I have no choice but to work overtime

examples.sentence: 電車が遅れたため、タクシーに乗るざるを得なかった。
examples.translation: Because the train was delayed, I had no choice but to take a taxi.
examples.translationEn: Because the train was delayed, I had no choice but to take a taxi
examples.romaji: Densha ga okureta tame, takushii ni noru zaru wo enakatta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Because the train was delayed, I had no choice but to take a taxi

examples.sentence: 彼女の説明が納得できなかったが、とりあえず信じざるを得ない。
examples.translation: I couldn’t really accept her explanation, but for now I have no choice but to believe her.
examples.translationEn: I couldn’t really accept her explanation, but for now I have no choice but to believe her
examples.romaji: Kanojo no setsumei ga nattoku dekinakatta ga, toriaezu shinjizaru wo enai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I couldn’t really accept her explanation, but for now I have no choice but to believe her

examples.sentence: この状況では、新しい計画を立て直さざるを得ない。
examples.translation: In this situation, we have no choice but to revise the new plan.
examples.translationEn: In this situation, we have no choice but to revise the new plan
examples.romaji: Kono joukyou de wa, atarashii keikaku wo tatenaosazaru wo enai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: In this situation, we have no choice but to revise the new plan

examples.sentence: この曲を聞くと、歌わずにはいられない。
examples.translation: When I hear this song, I can’t help but sing.
examples.translationEn: When I hear this song, I can’t help but sing
examples.romaji: Kono kyoku o kiku to, utawazu ni wa irarenai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: When I hear this song, I can’t help but sing

examples.sentence: 彼女が泣いているのを見ると、慰めずにはいられない。
examples.translation: When I see her crying, I can’t resist comforting her.
examples.translationEn: When I see her crying, I can’t resist comforting her
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga naite iru no o miru to, nagusamezu ni wa irarenai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: When I see her crying, I can’t resist comforting her

examples.sentence: この小説は面白いので、読まずにはいられない。
examples.translation: This novel is so interesting that I can’t help but read it.
examples.translationEn: This novel is so interesting that I can’t help but read it
examples.romaji: Kono shousetsu wa omoshiroi no de, yomazu ni wa irarenai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This novel is so interesting that I can’t help but read it

examples.sentence: 彼はおいしい料理を前にすると、食べずにはいられない。
examples.translation: When he’s faced with delicious food, he can’t help but eat it.
examples.translationEn: When he’s faced with delicious food, he can’t help but eat it
examples.romaji: Kare wa oishii ryouri o mae ni suru to, tabezu ni wa irarenai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: When he’s faced with delicious food, he can’t help but eat it

examples.sentence: この雨は止みそうにない。
examples.translation: It doesn't seem like this rain will stop.
examples.translationEn: It doesnt seem like this rain will stop
examples.romaji: Kono ame wa yami sou ni nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: It doesnt seem like this rain will stop

examples.sentence: 彼が試験に合格しそうにない。
examples.translation: It doesn't look like he'll pass the exam.
examples.translationEn: It doesnt look like hell pass the exam
examples.romaji: Kare ga shiken ni goukaku shi sou ni nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: It doesnt look like hell pass the exam

examples.sentence: この料理がおいしそうにない。
examples.translation: This dish doesn't look like it will be tasty.
examples.translationEn: This dish doesnt look like it will be tasty
examples.romaji: Kono ryouri ga oishisou ni nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This dish doesnt look like it will be tasty

examples.sentence: この部屋はきれいそうにない。
examples.translation: This room doesn't seem likely to be clean.
examples.translationEn: This room doesnt seem likely to be clean
examples.romaji: Kono heya wa kirei sou ni nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This room doesnt seem likely to be clean

examples.sentence: 電話をかけたかと思ったら、すぐに彼女が出た。
examples.translation: No sooner had I called than she picked up.
examples.translationEn: No sooner had I called than she picked up
examples.romaji: Denwa o kaketa ka to omottara, sugu ni kanojo ga deta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: No sooner had I called than she picked up

examples.sentence: 離陸したかと思ったら、飛行機が揺れ始めた。
examples.translation: As soon as we took off, the plane started shaking.
examples.translationEn: As soon as we took off, the plane started shaking
examples.romaji: Ririku shita ka to omottara, hikouki ga yure hajimeta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: As soon as we took off, the plane started shaking

examples.sentence: 買い物に行ったかと思ったら、雨が降ってきた。
examples.translation: No sooner had I gone shopping than it began to rain.
examples.translationEn: No sooner had I gone shopping than it began to rain
examples.romaji: Kaimono ni itta ka to omottara, ame ga futte kita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: No sooner had I gone shopping than it began to rain

examples.sentence: 仕事を終わったかと思ったら、上司が追加の仕事を持ってきた。
examples.translation: As soon as I finished work, my boss brought more tasks.
examples.translationEn: As soon as I finished work, my boss brought more tasks
examples.romaji: Shigoto o owatta ka to omottara, joushi ga tsuika no shigoto o motte kita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: As soon as I finished work, my boss brought more tasks

examples.sentence: 彼は会社を辞めたきり、連絡がない。
examples.translation: Ever since he quit the company, there's been no contact.
examples.translationEn: Ever since he quit the company, theres been no contact
examples.romaji: Kare wa kaisha o yameta kiri, renraku ga nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Ever since he quit the company, theres been no contact

examples.sentence: 昨日の朝、メールを送ったきり、返事がない。
examples.translation: I sent an email yesterday morning, and there's been no reply since then.
examples.translationEn: I sent an email yesterday morning, and theres been no reply since then
examples.romaji: Kinō no asa, mēru o okutta kiri, henji ga nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I sent an email yesterday morning, and theres been no reply since then

examples.sentence: 子供のころ海に行ったきりで、もう20年になる。
examples.translation: It's been 20 years since I last went to the sea as a child.
examples.translationEn: Its been 20 years since I last went to the sea as a child
examples.romaji: Kodomo no koro umi ni itta kiri de, mō nijūnen ni naru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its been 20 years since I last went to the sea as a child

examples.sentence: 彼女と別れたきり、彼女のことを考えなくなった。
examples.translation: Ever since I broke up with her, I stopped thinking about her.
examples.translationEn: Ever since I broke up with her, I stopped thinking about her
examples.romaji: Kanojo to wakareta kiri, kanojo no koto o kangaenaku natta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Ever since I broke up with her, I stopped thinking about her
